dataset.title: Empirical Data: A Policy-Driven Branching and Environment Isolation Strategy for Enterprise DevSecOps: An Empirical Industrial Case Study

related_publication.title: A Policy-Driven Branching and Environment Isolation Strategy for Enterprise DevSecOps: An Empirical Industrial Case Study

phases.name: Baseline
phases.description: Legacy branching strategy with centralized approval

phases.name: Transition
phases.description: Implementation and learning phase of new strategy

phases.name: Post-Implementation
phases.description: Stabilized operation under new branching strategy

context.system: Pay Portal - Enterprise Payment Processing System

data_collection.methodology: Automated data collection from version control, CI/CD pipelines, and project management systems

tools.name: Git Repository Analysis
tools.purpose: Commit history, branch patterns, merge conflict tracking

tools.name: CI/CD Pipeline Monitoring
tools.purpose: Deployment frequency, success rates, pipeline metrics

tools.name: Project Management
tools.purpose: Feature completion, story points, team velocity

data_collection.validation: Monthly manual audits and cross-validation across multiple data sources

key_performance_indicators.name: Deployment Autonomy Improvement
key_performance_indicators.note: 70.8% reduction in AWT recovers ~580 engineering hours annually. Supporting metric: autonomy rate rises from 31.7% to 87.7%.

key_performance_indicators.name: Deployment Frequency Increase
key_performance_indicators.note: Based on 214 total deployment events over 12-month study period.

data_files.description: Monthly merge conflict occurrences and resolution metrics

Production deployment frequency and success rate tracking. Includes Feature_Dev_Deployments and Total_All_Deployments columns capturing all 214 deployment events referenced in the manuscript. Total_Deployments (production+hotfix, 158 events) remains unchanged as the KPI basis.
Deployment autonomy and CI/CD automation metrics

Pre-production security incidents aggregated by study period (Baseline vs. Post-Implementation). Supports Table III (Security Outcome Metrics) in the manuscript. Covers three categories: Unauthorized Config Drift (−85.7%), Unscanned Container Images (−100%), Secret Leakage Pre-commit (−16.7%). Total incidents reduced from 35 to 12 (−65.7%).
Branch creation, merge, and lifecycle management patterns
Pull request review efficiency and quality metrics
Overall team productivity and delivery performance

ethics_and_compliance.institutional_review: Not applicable - observational study of development metrics
ethics_and_compliance.informed_consent: Team members provided informed consent for data collection
ethics_and_compliance.data_anonymization: All data aggregated and anonymized; no PII included

reproducibility.analysis_scripts: Sample analysis code provided in README.md
reproducibility.expected_outcomes: Statistical validation of claimed KPI improvements
